notes: Core mechanics are mostly implemented but the maze renders as filled blue blocks rather than proper corridor-style walls, significantly hurting visual fidelity and readability, while ghost release/leaving logic has potential movement synchronization issues.

A solid and mostly complete Pac-Man clone with working movement, ghosts, pellets, power mode, fruit, lives, and states, but it is not flawless due to simplified visuals/maze rendering and some likely behavioral inaccuracies versus authentic Pac-Man.
